signUp.title: Create your account
signUp.checkEmail: Check your email to confirm your account, then sign in.

join.title: Join a household
join.checkEmail: Check your email to confirm your account. Your invite will be applied when you sign in.

forgot.title: Reset your password
forgot.description: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
forgot.sent: Check your email for a reset link.

createHousehold.title: Create Your Household
createHousehold.description: Give your household a name to get started.

errors.emailNotConfirmed: Please confirm your email before signing in.
errors.weakPassword: Password must be at least 6 characters.
errors.rateLimited: Too many failed attempts. Please try again in 15 minutes.
errors.alreadyMember: You are already a member of a household. Please sign in instead.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.googlePopupBlocked: Popup was blocked. Please allow popups and try again.
errors.googleTimeout: Google sign-in timed out. Please try again.
